summary: Comprehensive table-driven tests for config.Load covering defaults, validation errors, backward-compat migration, all source types, and LLM providers

observations.text: Each test writes a temp YAML file via writeTestConfig helper and calls Load — tests are fully isolated with no shared state

TestLoad_SourcesRedditDefaultSort explicitly asserts that Sort is empty string after load ('Sort can be empty — the RedditSource constructor will default to hot') — documents the intentional split between config defaults and source constructor defaults
